name: OurRevolution.com
subject: We have a deadline tonight
body:
While we can't match the billionaire class dollar for dollar, we have to try.
#
Friends,
President Trump's State of the Union showed us what we need to fight for this year. He is organizing a deportation force that will separate families, escalating the so-called War on Drugs, and giving huge tax breaks to corporations at every opportunity. To make this happen, Republicans in Congress are ready to sell out the American people to keep receiving windfalls of campaign cash from special interests and multinational corporations in America.
We have to organize if we are going to beat them. While we can't match the billionaire class dollar for dollar, we have to try. We need your help to meet our fundraising deadline.
[**Chip in $5 right now toward our $50,000 end-of-month goal to keep our organizing campaigns on track.**](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7ad61/bed43eb/4f340877/75fed50d/2120626338/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/or-eom?refcode=em180131-re&noskip=true")
We can't do this alone. Our greatest successes come when all of us pitch in together and organize for real change, and we've seen some inspiring victories because of it. There are over 532 local Our Revolution groups organizing for change in communities across the country.
We can change the status quo if we commit to it right now. Every new person at an organizing meeting is one more friend who will protect our undocumented sisters and brothers, one more person willing to fight for Medicare for All. This is how we build the political revolution.
[**Commit just $5 to help us hit our $50,000 end-of-month fundraising goal and build our local organizing efforts for progressive change.**](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7ad61/bed43eb/4f340877/75fed50d/2120626338/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/or-eom?refcode=em180131-re&noskip=true")
Friends, this is no time to stay on the sidelines. It's up to us--[**chip in $5 right now and help us reach our goal.**](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7ad61/bed43eb/4f340877/75fed50d/2120626338/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/or-eom?refcode=em180131-re&noskip=true")
In solidarity,
The Team at Our Revolution
**[CONTRIBUTE»](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7ad61/bed43eb/4f340877/75fed50d/2120626338/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/or-eom?refcode=em180131-re&noskip=true")**
PAID FOR BY OUR REVOLUTION
603 2ND ST, NE
WASHINGTON, DC, 20002

Not authorized by any candidate or candidate committee. Our Revolution is a 501(c)(4) organization. Donations to Our Revolution are not deductible as charitable contributions for Federal income tax purposes. All donations are made to support Our Revolution's general mission and are not designated for any specific activity.
603 2nd St NE, Washington, DC 20002
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you need to update or change your information or email address, click here to [update your info](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7ad61/bed43eb/4f340877/75fed50c/2120626338/VEsD/ "https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/s/information-update?source=email_footer"). Email is one of the most important tools we have to reach supporters like you, but you can let us know if you'd like to [receive fewer emails](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7ad61/bed43eb/4f340877/75fed50f/2120626338/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjIyMTIzIn0=/ "https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/s/OR-fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=22123"). We'd hate to see you go, but if you need to do so, click here to [unsubscribe](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7ad61/bed43eb/4f340877/75fed50e/2120626338/VEsB/ "https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/unsubscribe/"). Help us continue transforming American politics and fighting for progressive candidates and causes by [contributing to Our Revolution here](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7ad61/bed43eb/4f340877/75fed509/2120626338/VEsO/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ourrevolution?refcode=email-footer-OR").

name: Greg
subject: What Your Donation Means To Me
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Greg Pence for Congress |
body:
I wanted to take a moment to thank all of the Hoosiers who have already stepped up this month as well as those who’ve joined me in the fight for... | |
---
I wanted to take a moment to thank all of the Hoosiers who have already stepped up this month as well as those who’ve joined me in the fight for the Sixth District of Indiana.

I've spoken to a number of you along the campaign trail who tell me that you want a representative who actually represents you in Washington. The Sixth District is my home. I've been here for nearly 60 years. I will always put Hoosiers FIRST.

That’s why I’m Ready to Serve Again.

It's almost midnight, which means our fundraising deadline is nearly here.

Thankfully, we've received lots of support over the last 24 hours, and we're now only $1,026 short of our $10,000 goal.

If you think your friends & family might want to join our team, please be sure to forward this email to them too.

Every dollar counts. Every dollar demonstrates that our conservative, Hoosier-focused agenda is exactly what people in the Sixth District want.

Here's a safe and secure link to donate:
**[https://secure.gregpenceforcongress.com/action-234537/](http://links.gregpenceforcongress.com/u/click?_t=c56a42391aaa4fc29673628e10310dda&_m=83b81a1ef3b049ef96702b88f28a7038&_e=bKFdEcI4cGmE3MgeE-_jJeLQcGPf24n4ocl1EZydUiyu8kjXwkPe4_b0vcC1C1mbG4dTQ3KhvVZx3KDjvvuSJjeaePLCp7c4IfCAj_K5rGM2aInaCHrnQeLJiYRQ1RVq9po9GWM6leCi84bO2qbzDPs-NJe7sVg4mGTCpNQE4d7h_czMu12mE2pjd6PtmxamuXKcDneq0UIYc14gPyVqguKa5X5pS2yV3PFQYl5ldKZiQ8h3otAw5l0BjGAISFEwlLRdWSkeTNGzWE7AJ5SpQ4Y4SPDNWqTjyPGfFrEauo9OJkNS9s3sNZFu1Tu2uXkCCEL6leb8-liimW_6YPvqfeWxeAzsPZFHeEvmaUM2ClnJkXtlK095UVDPrEbhSq3V6ChOShA4WL-BpEZ4T-1PtJf_uCROvZaPoWi8GLZS6HY%3D)**

name: The White House
subject: A strong economy makes for a strong Nation
body:
1600 Daily
https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=21abe1ce9f6b0eb7bd1ee637d8a55baf3138194f06ed8ab5956a567a9e79db09b6db7fa867bfccbe4080ef1a4d052edbeeeab55a72b06b52

A strong economy makes for a strong Nation

Just a little more than one year after President Donald J. Trump’s Inauguration, the United States has reaped the benefits of what the President calls the “American Model” economy.

“So to every citizen at home tonight,” President Trump said during his State of the Union address Tuesday night, “this is your time.” That optimism and confidence has spread across the country. More than 250 companies have announced bonuses, pay raises, higher retirement plan contributions, or other investments in their business or workforce.

The President shared
https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=21abe1ce9f6b0eb7029dd4f27e5e3db008fbb0fd219b4542dfbbc00c285e99ee762a82aa86cee8ba771a7e431c1ab5fb956ee2d551f1a5a0
several of these success stories during his speech Tuesday. Less than 24 hours later, he met with seven more American workers in the Oval Office to discuss how tax reform is benefitting their companies.

“Millions of Americans will have more take-home pay starting next month,” the President told Americans this week. “A lot more.”

Read more:
https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=21abe1ce9f6b0eb7f0133e9c9f158229c111204a7fb7639d161a930c947e49cb11fccb9be982d1854fbc5d66d7ce48ed8447478d810bf516
The good news keeps rolling in for American workers

The President’s speech in 88 seconds

President Trump had a busy first year—signing major tax reform legislation, reasserting America on the global stage, and appointing Supreme Court Justice Neil Gorsuch, for starters. With plenty of accomplishments and a detailed vision for 2018 to share, the President spoke for 1 hour and 20 minutes during Tuesday’s State of the Union address. It was the third longest address of the past 50 years.

If you missed the President’s speech or simply want to relive the highlights, this montage video clocks in at 1 minute and 28 seconds.

Watch:
https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=21abe1ce9f6b0eb7ced045dcd03bbf5b5ab67e04e90a29c022b63e66885fddac2d06a1389926ac68b50d54e914177141ac1ca986d1609f0c
President Donald J. Trump delivers the 2018 State of the Union address

The game plan to rebuild America

One of the key themes from President Trump’s State of the Union was the need to address the deteriorating condition of American infrastructure. “As we rebuild our industries, it is also time to rebuild our crumbling infrastructure,” the President told Americans.

He laid out a number of steps to do so, including:

- Generate at least $1.5 trillion in infrastructure investment over the next decade

- Eliminate unnecessary redundancies and inefficiencies in the regulatory and permitting process
- Empower state and local authorities to prioritize infrastructure projects based on their communities’ needs
- Dedicate a quarter of federal funds to address the infrastructure needs of rural areas

“I am asking both parties to come together to give us safe, fast, reliable, and modern infrastructure that our economy needs and our people deserve,” President Trump told Congress.

Read more:
https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=21abe1ce9f6b0eb74493721d9faf1f381a5d4cd42a040d618c3f83141cc1a06134815f095eb689b1c4bd6c67701e7756299e3e8a19cad872
Rebuilding American infrastructure and forging a path toward prosperity

Photo of the Day

First Lady Melania Trump at the State of the Union | January 30, 2018 (Official White House Photo by Andrea Hanks)

POTUS TODAY

Today, President Trump will deliver remarks to the 2018 House and Senate Republican Member Conference in Lewisburg, West Virginia.

In the afternoon, the Vice President will participate in a swearing-in ceremony for Ambassador-at-Large for International Religious Freedom Sam Brownback.

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=21abe1ce9f6b0eb7a2f9a017bf44e60258218c112c760de346763f46180795ddd516ba96b37ad4db91df6411982b130d12f92d1b05e2ba45
Privacy Policy |

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=21abe1ce9f6b0eb7add1767ac787abfa760a28b5a5f599c7815d011a861de771ed235d3a20bc05dc681dc2a635a3e2b2581936f7ac391467
Contact the White House |

Unsubscribe

name: Bobby Jindal
subject: WSJ: A Look Ahead at the Post-Trump GOP
body:
**A Look Ahead at the Post-Trump GOP**
_It is possible that the party needed him to broaden its appeal and that he has to disappear for it to survive._
_The Wall Street Journal_
Bobby Jindal
Barack Obama famously aspired to be transformative like Ronald Reagan rather than incremental like Bill Clinton. What about Donald Trump? His friends and foes alike seem to share only the conviction that he changes everything. But it’s worth considering how lasting his legacy will prove to be. What will happen to the conservative populist movement that he masterfully discerned and harnessed—but did not create—after he is done?

Contrary to conventional wisdom, the real danger with Mr. Trump is that he may end up changing little. This is not to detract from his real accomplishments in undoing much of the Obama regulatory regime, enacting pro-growth corporate tax reform, and appointing judges who recognize they are not legislators. But Mr. Trump is clearly a one-man show, sticking his finger in the dike to hold back liberalism’s flood, while both parties seemingly learn nothing and try to wait him out.
It is easy to lose sight of the substance and be distracted by the disruptive style, the aura of celebrity, the in-your-face tweets, and the unapologetic combative demeanor. While the new judges represent permanent change, and the lower tax rates may last a while, most of the executive orders and regulatory actions can be easily reversed. Mr. Trump is a man, not a movement; he embodies executive strength, not a philosophy. When his time in office is up, he may leave behind millions of frustrated, voiceless people facing a status quo government and two limp, self-serving political parties eager to return to what they were, which wasn’t much.

Peter,

I wanted to share that because of the generosity of this community, we not only met our End-of-Month fundraising goal -- we exceeded it!

This community continually steps up, and for that, I'm immensely grateful.

Our work could have a huge impact in 2018, including flipping the House and Senate, and I wanted to thank you for helping our candidates day in, day out.

Together, we can achieve _all_ of our goals this year.

Thanks -- and go team!

Emily Cain
Executive Director, EMILY's List

name: Andrew Gillum
subject: Leader
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Andrew Gillum, Democrat, for Governor
body:
[](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb31c3/9e00690/43907844/24039893/204549991/VEsH/ "https://andrewgillum.com/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=gillum&utm_content=1&utm_campaign=em18_180104_Welc1Rec_engg_gq_ful__AG&source=em18_180104_Welc1Rec_engg_gq_ful__AG")
Hello,

Growing up, my mom was a school bus driver and my dad was a construction worker. I was a skinny kid who came from a big family -- I'm the fifth of seven children.

While we weren't the wealthiest family by any means, my parents taught me the importance of hard work. And my grandmother, who didn't have a formal education herself, taught me the importance of getting an education and surrounding myself with a strong community.

They wanted me and my brothers and sister to know we were responsible for more than ourselves -- that when one of us went far, we all went far. That idea still drives me today -- and it's driving this campaign, too.

**[But I'm going to need your help to win in November -- so add your name now and join me in this fight.](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb31c3/9e00690/43907844/24039892/204549991/VEsE/ "http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/s/join-team-gillum?utm_campaign=em17_180104_Welc1Rec_engg_gq_ful__AG&utm_medium=email&utm_source=Gillum&source=em17_180104_Welc1Rec_engg_gq_ful__AG&utm_content=2+-+But+Im+going+to+need+your+help+to+win+in")**

For me, being a Democrat has always been about welcoming folks just as they are. This was the party that advocated for my parents growing up, that fought for progress for all of us. And that's what I've worked to do in my time as Mayor of Tallahassee.

I believe we are at a time in our state and our nation's history that require our leaders to be champions on critical issues that our families are facing. I promise to be that leader.

**[Add your name now and help me rebuild Florida into a state that works for all of us.](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb31c3/9e00690/43907844/24039895/204549991/VEsF/ "http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/s/join-team-gillum?utm_campaign=em17_180104_Welc1Rec_engg_gq_ful__AG&utm_medium=email&utm_source=Gillum&source=em17_180104_Welc1Rec_engg_gq_ful__AG&utm_content=3+-+Add+your+name+now+and+help+me+rebuild+Fl")**

Thank you,

Andrew

[Donate](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb31c3/9e00690/43907844/24039894/204549991/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gillum-donate?utm_campaign=em17_180104_Welc1Rect_engg_gq_ful__AG&utm_medium=email&utm_source=Gillum&refcode=em17_180104_Welc1Rec_engg_gq_ful__AG&utm_content=4+-+Donate")

P.S. If you're not interested in receiving email communications, I understand. Last year, Mitch McConnell, Paul Ryan, and Donald Trump jammed their wildly unpopular tax scam bill that hands massive tax breaks to corporate billionaires through Congress and signed it into law.

President Trump's complete ignorance of climate science is inexcusable. | [](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd79cb9/2f5ea88d/739c2495/2cbc9b54/458799834/VEsH/ "https://www.facebook.com/jayinslee") | "Think left and think right and think low and think high. Oh, the thinks you can think up if only you try!"
\- Dr. Seuss
---
Friend,
My grandkids love Dr. Seuss. Heck, I love Dr. Seuss.
But it shouldn't be where President Trump gets the inspiration for his climate policy.
Did you see what nonsense Trump said to Piers Morgan earlier this week about our planet?
_**"There is a cooling and there's a heating -- I mean, look, it used to not be climate change. It used to be global warming. That wasn't working too well because it was getting too cold all over the place. The ice caps were going to melt. They were going to be gone by now, but now they're setting records, okay? They're at a record level." - President Donald Trump**_
---
Oh, the things he thinks up!
Mr. President, I have one message for you -- facts and science matter! So while Trump lyrically denies climate science, and while he spends his State of the Union in the other Washington bragging about a fictionalized war on "clean" coal, we are going to lead our Washington to a real clean energy future.
Look, climate science has always been a driving force in my political beliefs. That's why we're fighting for the nation's first real price on carbon in Washington. In the face of failure and inaction from the other Washington, we're going to lead this country on fighting climate change. Because Donald Trump cannot stop us from acting on climate -- and creating the thousands of clean energy jobs that come with it.
Another week, another set of reasons of why this fight is so important. I'm glad to have you by my side in this fight. Reply back to this message and let me know what you think of climate change and the improvements we're making in the state. **Just hit "reply" to send a message right to me.**
In the words of Dr. Seuss, "Unless someone like you cares a whole awful lot, nothing is going to get better. It's not."
Very truly yours,
Jay Inslee
[FOLLOW JAY »](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd79cb9/2f5ea88d/739c2495/2cbc9b54/458799834/VEsE/ "https://www.facebook.com/jayinslee")
